messages.content: You are a helpful, concise assistant.

I need a quick vegetarian weeknight pasta using pantry staples: canned tomatoes, chickpeas, onions, garlic, dried pasta, and I have a bag of frozen spinach. 30 minutes max and minimal cleanup. Include exact quantities and clear steps.
Try this 25-minute one-pot chickpea, tomato, and spinach pasta; here’s what you’ll need
